title: Funding
doc_html:
§1217.11. Funding

            The medical center may seek and receive monies from any source, including federal funds, grants, and gifts which shall be expended for the purposes designated in this Part.

            Acts 1995, No. 951, §1; Acts 1997, No. 557, §1, eff. July 1, 1997; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.91 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1217.11.  Funding
The medical center may seek and receive monies from any source, including federal
funds, grants, and gifts which shall be expended for the purposes designated in this Part.
Acts 1995, No. 951, §1; Acts 1997, No. 557, §1, eff. July 1, 1997; Redesignated from
R.S. 40:1300.91 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
